title: F1 2021 Boat
body:
## [Announcement] **✨ New project ✨** **A newer pack with improved visuals and fixes is out: →[The Formula](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/the-formula)**
[![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a27b4881f0ee0bb2b32570c6ddb0af7dca0d44bf.jpeg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/the-formula)![Gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f857347aa9070d65cdfc83c4c780e6af6f692eb.gif) --- ## [Description] F1-Boat-Textures ### oak_boat - Ferrari 16,55 - Alfaromeo 7,99 ### spruce_boat - Alphatauri 10,22 - Haas 47,9 ### birch_boat - Alpine 14,31 - Williams 63,6 ### jungle_boat - RedBull 33,11 ### acacia_boat - Mclaren 4,3 - Astonmartin 18,5 ### dark_oak_boat - MercedesAMG 44,77 ## How to specify **1.21.3-1.21.10** ``` /summon _boat ~ ~ ~ {CustomName:"_"} ``` Example ``` /summon spruce_boat ~ ~ ~ {CustomName:"22_hard"} ``` ## More Boats - [Car Boats](https://modrinth.com/collection/AbSty1Yt) - [Other Boats](https://modrinth.com/collection/fhSW6Pfo)
